title: First Date
description: Break the ice and go deeper — great for a first date or getting to know someone new.

cards.question: What's something you're really proud of but rarely get to talk about?
What does your perfect Sunday look like?
What's a place you've been to that genuinely surprised you?
What's something most people get wrong about you when they first meet you?
What's your current obsession — could be anything?
What's the best piece of advice you've ever ignored?
If you could live anywhere for one year, where would it be?
cards.followUp: What would a typical day look like?

cards.question: What's something that used to matter a lot to you that doesn't anymore?
What's a skill you wish you'd started learning earlier?
What's one thing that always makes you feel like yourself again when you've lost track of that?

title: Deep Friends
description: For friends who want to go beyond small talk. Vulnerability welcome.

cards.question: What's something you've never told anyone in this group?
Which of your beliefs has changed the most in the last five years?
What do you think your friends misunderstand about you?
When did you last feel genuinely proud of yourself?
What's something you've been putting off that you know you should deal with?
What's a version of yourself you've had to let go of?
If your life right now were a chapter in a book, what would the chapter be called?
What's a fear you haven't admitted to most people?
What do you wish someone had told you five years ago?
What's something that's been weighing on you lately that you haven't spoken about?

title: Solo Reflection
description: Take some time for yourself. Honest questions, no audience required.

cards.question: What do you want more of in your life right now?
What habit is quietly holding you back?
What would you do differently if you weren't afraid of what people think?
Who in your life makes you feel most like yourself?
What are you grateful for that you rarely say out loud?
What part of your life needs more honesty?
What's the kindest thing you've done for yourself recently?
If you could give your current self one permission, what would it be?

title: Party Mode
description: Light, fun, and a little chaotic. Perfect for a group at the bar or a train ride.

cards.question: What's the most questionable decision you've made that turned out great?
What's your most embarrassing talent?
What's the most ridiculous hill you would die on?
If you had to describe yourself using only a food and a movie, what would they be?
What's something you believed as a kid that you're almost embarrassed about now?
What's the most out-of-character thing you've ever done?
Which fictional character do you think you'd be best friends with?
What's an unpopular opinion you hold with zero shame?
What's something everyone else seems to love that you just don't get?
If your life had a theme song right now, what would it be?
